review_title: I'm really beginning to enjoy synerion
author: Daniel M.
pros: I enjoy real time reporting features of synerion which gives insight and updates of workforce data
cons: The cost of synerion is something to talk about. It is abit expensive

description: Can review OT, hours spent on a daily, weekly and monthly basis. Can look at the whole team or an individual employee. We can adjust any of the areas that will benefit us when discussed with a Synerion team member.
author: Mike R.
pros: Easily used on a daily basis, customer service on questions is a one on one meeting with an expert on their product, always looking to improve their product, and webinars often to cover any changes they make in their product.
cons: I did not have any least liked concerns about the product because it was implemented easily and fixed a big opportunity in our hourly payroll punching and reporting.

description: It has been very time consuming to use. Admin still has to go through each day for each employee every month to check if the system has recorded time off properly into the accrual system. Synerion also promotes "webinar training" on their website but there is nothing offered.
author: Darlene S.
pros: The absence request system drew us in as we liked the audit feature of the approvals. It does not work properly.
cons: The absence request system and subsequent accrual tracking.

review_title: Easy time and attendance system for employees to use
description: Overall we used the system as intended and it was not as expensive as some other systems.
author: Val C.
pros: Easy and intuitive system for employees to use
cons: The admin side is more complex and maintaining it can be time consuming and difficult at times.

description: Introduction of Synerion software in our organisation has made it more easier for us to manage both time and productivity needs. This has been made possible by being able to schedule employees and value labour in real-time.
author: Gideon B.
pros: The best thing about Synerion is its ability to streamline time tracking processes and ensure timely payment of employees.
cons: Apart from reluctant customer care services providers. The product is worth it.

review_title: Keeps good records, organized, simple and easy to use
description: Overall it did the job and worked well with many users, nobody had challenges with it across all tech skill levels.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Synerion is simple and easy to use for everyone to track time and attendance, keeps good organization of records, easy to reference at any time either on desktop or mobile.
cons: The UI/UX could be aesthetically improved a bit, it's functional but could look little nicer if they made some cosmetic adjustments. Making manual adjustments was sometimes a challenge.

description: My experience has been very positive with this software. Everything is very automated for myself and employees.
author: LISA C.
pros: This program makes scheduling so easy. Scheduling, shift switching, vacation, sick leave. Does it all.
cons: As with all programs, there is a learning curve. The program has demos available. It's very automated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Synerion made us save a lot of time & money
description: Our employees are all unionised & there are many premiums to apply because of their convention. I am sooo amazed on how Synerion are able to program these work rules within the application & thus making it very easy for us to program & download our pays
author: Lyne C.
pros: How much time we save by using this application which in turn makes of save a lot of money because of the time it takes & the errors in data entry that we used to make when doing the pays manually.
cons: We have been using this application for almost 10 years & I am able to say that the experience as gotten better & better because of the improvements that they have made throughout these 10 years. So, I really have nothing negative to say

review_title: This software allowed control working hours , vacation , day sicking .
description: It is good software to control employees working hours .
author: Alexander S.
pros: This software allowed control working hours , vacation , day sicking . It is very helpful for company administration .
cons: Some time when you have make enter at system it is miss at Synerion .

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I had an excellent experience with Synerion thanks to their amazing customer service. They were prompt, attentive, and resolved the issues I had. The product itself has a lot of features making it one of the best choices in the workforce management software category.
cons: I found the user interface to be quite disappointing. Navigating through the software is a struggle, and accessing specific features requires a certain level of familiarity which proved to be a steep learning curve for me as a new user.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I would recommend this company to any firm looking for a well support time keeping solution.
author: Yvette S.
pros: The product meets our needs at the current time and the company goes out of their way to inform you of any upcoming changes. My favorite part of this system is the customer support. They go above and beyond to help their customers. You could not ask for better support services!
cons: The product is a bit complex in some areas so takes some training. The training and customer support given by the company more than make up for this. The sad part is it will no longer be supported at the end of this year so an upgrade in product is required. But Synerion has gone out of their way to keep us up to date on this and what is required to upgrade.

author: Muhammad M.
pros: It is easy to use and give you all the revelent information.
cons: Nothing: Every thing looks great. It is user friendly. Provides all the required information

author: Yvon C.
pros: easy to use, friendly user, manage holliday very easy to add on
cons: when people punch should bring back to the schedule in place

description: Great software for daily employee attendance
author: Saro S.
pros: User friendly and web based, so it works on any device.
cons: Doesn't show the current time before punching in/out

description: We like that you can clock in and out from your Smart phone. Also, we like that staff can manage their own time off requests. They can also see what allotment they have left.
author: Karen R.
pros: The software is pretty customizable. We have various types of employees with many different schedules. We found this to be pretty straight forward to set up and utilize.
cons: There are a couple of things that we had to work around but for the most part, it works for our company.

author: Trisha S.
pros: I personally like the time clock, and that was the main reason that we picked Synerion. Also because most companies that we researched were American, and we wanted a Canadian company.
cons: I have not come across anything about Synerion that I don't like!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Steffanee K.
pros: Synerion system is extremely user friendly. The implementation process is fairly quick and went extremely smooth for us. The employee self service request for vacation/time off has significantly reduced the amount of paperwork and is a feature I would recommend for any company looking to reduce paperwork. Going from handwriten timecards to employees using key fobs to punch in and out of work has also drastically reduced the manual work load.
cons: There is nothing negative I can write about Synerion. It is a very user friendly program that even the not so tech savvy individual could use.

description: I like the system, very easy to use and understand, it is simple
author: Roy C.
pros: easy to use, the guide explains well, easy to understand and to find
cons: Nothing, I have nothing negative to say about the system

review_title: Not what we had in mind.
author: Babithiraa T.
pros: - Customer service is good. The reps try to help us as much as they can. - Scheduler can be used by employees that are 9-5 standards hours - Allowing export reports,, helps with administration side.
cons: - Employee annual entitlement is not displayed on dashboard and a report is not available - Synerion does not directly export into payroll platform. - Scheduler is more ideal for retail and not an office environment. - No mobile app for Synerion Agile - Past absence history on Employee portal is not available. This is one of the main reasons for us to move to an online portal. - Can not bank lieu days.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sherry L.
pros: We have over 1000 unionized employees in 3 separate locations (on 15 terminals). The calculations are accurate, taking into account the different lunch periods of employees. We were able to automate and program our complicated statutory holiday rules, accruals and hourly rate increases in the middle of the pay-period (split pays) thus eliminating quite a lot of manual work and verification. Synerion created import/export features to move data back and forth between the time and attendance software and our payroll software. As we do not have HR software, the employee profile in the CoreHr module was programmed to our exact needs and meets our requirements. The Project Manager asked the right questions and suggested ways to give us the desired results. Synerion provides excellent customer service.
cons: The built in reporting features could be better. It is easy to extract employee profile data and create an excel file, but other fields are not as user-friendly. We are still going through the learning process but think that we may have to resort to Crystal or Tableau to give us the data that we need in the presentation required.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Champagne J.
pros: Realy frendly user, It's constantly getting better
cons: The help menu in the corner is always catch by other action, also the policies of the written is very small

author: Jeff C.
pros: The Synerion application has made employee time tracking a breeze. We have improved our time tracking efficiency by approximately 40% since implementation over our previous solution, and expect further improvements as we learn more about the additional features available as part of the application. Great ROI for our medium-sized business.
cons: Express implementation/setup took a bit more time than expected. However, when we ran into a setup issue we were unable to resolve, a tech representative from Synerion helped us through it on the phone and it was fixed to our satisfaction within 30 mins. No other notable cons at this time.

author: Emmanuel A.
pros: I like that all orojects can be billed individually from the app without too much trouble. This makes working on multiple projects possible and easy to bill.
cons: It was easy to use once it was explained to me but was not immediately obvious where to go to find things within the tabs
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Harjot Kaur D.
pros: Our college has setup this software for online punch system. Easy to use, understand and track things. Great software instead of punch in which sometime doesn;t read fingerprints. I am very happy with it.
cons: I haven't come across any problem so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: my review of synerion so far
description: so far, it has been a smooth experience
author: Middleton U.
pros: I am yet to experience any glitches since i have been using it, every time i sign in or sign off the timing is accurate
cons: the interface, i would like to suggest an updated version/upgrade of the ux/ix design as well as the font type.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
